mapper.sql: r.emp_plan_id, r.risk_sn, r.risk_desc, r.ctrl_actv, r.use_bgng_dt, r.use_end_dt, r.frst_reg_dt, r.frst_reg_user_id, r.last_chg_dt, r.last_chg_user_id
mapper.select: SELECT FROM emp.tn_emp_risk r WHERE r.emp_plan_id = #{empPlanId} AND NOW() BETWEEN r.use_bgng_dt AND r.use_end_dt ORDER BY r.risk_sn ASC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO emp.tn_emp_risk (emp_plan_id, risk_sn, risk_desc, ctrl_actv, use_bgng_dt, use_end_dt, frst_reg_dt, frst_reg_user_id, last_chg_dt, last_chg_user_id) VALUES (#{empPlanId}, #{riskSn}, #{riskDesc}, #{ctrlActv}, NOW(), '9999-12-31 23:59:59', NOW(), #{frstRegUserId}, NOW(), #{lastChgUserId})

INSERT INTO emp.tn_emp_risk (emp_plan_id, risk_sn, risk_desc, ctrl_actv, use_bgng_dt, use_end_dt, frst_reg_dt, frst_reg_user_id, last_chg_dt, last_chg_user_id) SELECT #{dstEmpPlanId}, risk_sn, risk_desc, ctrl_actv, NOW(), '9999-12-31 23:59:59', NOW(), #{userId}, NOW(), #{userId} FROM emp.tn_emp_risk WHERE emp_plan_id = #{srcEmpPlanId} AND NOW() BETWEEN use_bgng_dt AND use_end_dt
